claim_bullets.bullet_text: Partial application is common in JavaScript libraries (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.80-81).
You can apply arguments either leftmost or rightmost (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.80-81).
Partial application uses building blocks for function composition (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.80-81).

source_record_text: Chapter on partial application in JavaScript Allongé, discussing recipes for partial application and examples using callFirst, callLast, callLeft, and callRight.
